title: Candy Bonanza 5 in Row
description: Click the candy you want to move, then click the place that you want it to go. but if other candies were on the moving route, you cannot pass through. Your mission is to move candies to align the same color of candies for 5 or more in a horizontal, vertical or diagonal line to crush. Get a high score and visite hyhygames.com for more games
instructions: click on candy then click on the place you want it to go
